title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at Arena Animation
jsonLd.description:
Arena Animation, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Arena Animation:
Arena Animation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Arena Animation!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
